name: Tasty Mince Meat & Peas with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rice and let it drain.
2. Heat ghee in a large saucepan with a tight-fitting lid. Fry the cumin seeds with the onion, garlic, ginger, and cloves until the onion is soft and golden brown.
3. Add the minced meat and fry over moderately high heat until the mince is browned.
4. Add peas and 1/2 cup water, stir well, cover, and cook until peas are half done.
5. Add rice and hot water, then stir in the salt.
6. Bring to a boil quickly, lower the heat very low, and cook for 10 minutes.
7. Uncover and sprinkle with garam masala; do not stir. Replace the lid and continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed and rice is cooked through. Serve hot.
